name: Mushroom Crisps
steps: Trim 1 cm off the length of the mushroom.
Using the meat slicer slice the mushrooms into slices with the sliced mushrooms syrup.
Place the slices on the silpat making sure they are not touching.
Dry at 55 degrees Celsius for 12 hours until crispy.
Store in airtight container with silica gel.
Remove mushroom crisps (the same size) from the container.
Place rectangle of ganache on top of the mushroom crisp.
Place another piece of the ganache, forming a sandwich.
Finish with a thick mushroom gel, mushroom gel on top the sandwich and finish with a third mushroom crisp.
Serve small plate with clean napkin.
